{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/5554667?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/logicx24/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/logicx24/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/logicx24/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/logicx24/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/logicx24", "id": 5554667, "login": "logicx24", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU1NTQ2Njc=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/logicx24/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/logicx24/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/logicx24/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/logicx24/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/logicx24/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/logicx24", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-28415", "cvss": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-330", "name": "Use of Insufficiently Random Values"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-601", "name": "URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')"}], "description": "# Summary

The _redirect_to_target() function in Gradio's OAuth flow accepts an unvalidated _target_url query parameter, allowing redirection to arbitrary external URLs. This affects the /logout and /login/callback endpoints on Gradio apps with OAuth enabled (i.e. apps running on Hugging Face Spaces with gr.LoginButton).

## Details

```python

  def _redirect_to_target(request, default_target="/"):
      target = request.query_params.get("_target_url", default_target)
      return RedirectResponse(target)  # No validation
```
  An attacker can craft a URL like https://my-space.hf.space/logout?_target_url=https://evil.com/phishing that redirects the user to an external site after logout. Because the URL originates from a trusted hf.space domain, users are more likely to trust the link.

## Impact

Phishing — an attacker can use the trusted domain to redirect users to a malicious site. No direct data exposure or server-side impact.

 ## Fix
The _target_url parameter is now sanitized to only use the path, query, and fragment, stripping any scheme or host.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00232, "percentile": 0.13774}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pfjf-5gxr-995x", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-01T01:29:12Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pfjf-5gxr-995x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pfjf-5gxr-995x"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-28415"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-02-27T22:16:24Z", "published_at": "2026-03-01T01:29:12Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gradio-app/gradio/security/advisories/GHSA-pfjf-5gxr-995x", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28415", "https://github.com/gradio-app/gradio/commit/dfee0da06d0aa94b3c2684131e7898d5d5c1911e", "https://github.com/gradio-app/gradio/releases/tag/gradio%406.6.0", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/gradio/PYSEC-2026-65.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pfjf-5gxr-995x"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gradio-app/gradio/security-advisories/GHSA-pfjf-5gxr-995x", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gradio-app/gradio", "summary": "Gradio has an Open Redirect in its OAuth Flow", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-06T00:22:31Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pfjf-5gxr-995x", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.6.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "gradio"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.6.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Gradio has an Open Redirect in its OAuth Flow
